nasb.text: This was the inheritance of the sons of Zebulun according to their families, these cities with their villages.

esv.text: This is the inheritance of the people of Zebulun, according to their clans—these cities with their villages.

cnv.text: 這些城和屬於這些城的村莊，就是西布倫人按著家族所得的產業。

ccb.text: 以上这些城邑和乡村是西布伦人按宗族所得的产业。
